title: Decorative Lamps
description: This mod adds new lamps, which are dimmable and can be used via Redstone or manually.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb16077fa75a44feba40483b38d8bd63d1835dd4.png) ![Space line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73b99be2b52cc81207ea70ce9dc9fdae97aa520.png) ![includes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f55f02c9f0de6ef149bd71063bcb038e64d97a4b.png) > ### Note:
> ### The (Neo)Forge version needs dependencies found on the version page! - **Light Switch** _(White)_ - **Umbrella lamp** _(16 Colors)_ - **Paper Lantern** _(16 Colors)_ - **Polished blackstone lantern** _(with particles)_ - **Chandelier** _(Copper / Iron / Golden)_ - **Glowstone Slab and Stairs** - **Sea Lantern Slab and Stairs** - **Normal ceiling lamp** _(16 Colors)_ - **Elongated ceiling lamp** _(16 Colors)_ - **Cap for the elongated ceiling lamp** _(16 Colors)_ - **Wall Lattice lamp** _(16 Colors)_ - **Alot more!** This mod adds new lamps that look better than the vanilla lamps. They can be switched on and off with a right click or redstone and provide light for every part of your world. ![All All Lamps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B4n7BWWA/images/edb2e17bc5ad6fa9630db85c77baf34518d4bcd2.png) ![Example use of lanterns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B4n7BWWA/images/2d61dc67f758398eb654ad3239be0575d2c3c8a5.gif)
Recipes ![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B4n7BWWA/images/3e750b5f3ade57dbaabffe69ffd6357d8cb16c86.gif)
Zeus's Weapon Ritual ![Zeus's Weapon Ritual](https://www.tobias-gerhardt.de/decorative_lamps/images/120.gif) ### Whitelist for Zeus weapon > With the new command or the new config file, the OP can decide who is able to get/use this item. > ``` > /canBeZeus > ``` > can-be-zeus.json config > ``` > [ > { > "uuid":"5b58-d04f-3d22-9ce2-5a024b", > "name":"Player631" > } > ] > ```
![Dimmable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e4b34d667ce50f41e23bb02c5a63cac0954d87e.png) ![Space line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73b99be2b52cc81207ea70ce9dc9fdae97aa520.png) Each lamp has four modes that can be changed using the ceramic screwdriver: - ON / OFF (Using Hand) - ON / OFF (Using Redstone) - 16-Stage Dimmable (Using Hand) - 16-Stage Dimmable (Using Redstone) This means that worlds can be given a completely new atmosphere using redstone or by hand. Redstone professionals can create lighting effects. The simple ON / OFF modes can light up an entire room with a simple operation. ## Supported languages: - English (US) - French - German - Russian - Chinese ## Anyone can use this mod for free, but please share it by linking to this page and don't claim it's yours. I created this mod to learn something for myself in the field of modding. I asked people I know what else they would like in Minecraft and got the answer: nicer lamps Here they are! :)
